summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Class Platform Iteration 2 - Enhanced features including Zoom integration, attendance tracking, course management, reports & analytics, and payment tracking. Most features working correctly with some critical issues identified.

critical_bugs.issue: Zoom API returning 400 Bad Request during meeting creation
critical_bugs.impact: Zoom auto-meeting creation completely broken - key feature not working
critical_bugs.error_details: Client error '400 Bad Request' for url 'https://zoom.us/oauth/token' - suggests invalid credentials or API call format

minor_issues.issue: Returns 403 instead of 401 for unauthorized access
minor_issues.impact: Technically correct behavior but inconsistent with test expectations

ui_bugs.issue: Dialog overlay intercepting pointer events preventing form interactions
Sessions expiring quickly during testing causing frequent redirects to login
ui_bugs.impact: Poor user experience during extended admin tasks

integration_issues.issue: Some navigation elements not consistently found during automated testing

passed_tests: Admin login with correct credentials (admin@classplatform.com / admin123)
Admin dashboard overview with enhanced stats (Students: 6, Teachers: 5, Classes: 7, Completed: 0, Courses: 1, Hours: 0)
Zoom status indicator showing 'Auto meeting creation enabled'
All 7 sidebar navigation tabs visible (Overview, Teachers, Students, Classes, Courses, Reports, Payments)
Teacher creation with hourly rate support ($25.50 rate successfully stored)
Student enrollment with all mandatory fields (student name, parent name, contact, gmail, total classes)
Course management - create course, get courses, assign members to course
Google Meet class scheduling with manual link input
Reports & analytics endpoints - student summary, teacher summary, attendance log with filters
Payment tracking - record payment, get payments with teacher association
Teacher dashboard endpoints properly protected (403 Forbidden without auth)
Student dashboard endpoints properly protected (403 Forbidden without auth)
Responsive design working on tablet (768x1024) and mobile (390x844) viewports
Purple and white theme implementation consistent across all views
Backend API endpoints returning correct data structures
Frontend-backend integration working for most features
action_item_for_main_agent: CRITICAL: Fix Zoom API integration - 400 Bad Request error suggests invalid credentials or API call format. Verify Zoom Account ID, Client ID, and Client Secret. HIGH: Fix modal dialog overlay issues preventing form interactions. MEDIUM: Improve session management to prevent frequent logouts during admin tasks.
